message:
test(fcp-conformance/host-mcp-initialize-resource): pin MCP server/client info + initialize handshake + resource entry + SessionStatus predicates (resolves flywheel_connectors-kn3tk)

20 tests pinning three MCP surface groups beyond what
host_mcp_method_routing_conformance + host_mcp_error_code_jsonrpc
already covered.

- McpServerInfo::fcp_host() identifies as 'fcp-host' with non-empty
  CARGO_PKG_VERSION; serde roundtrip preserves name+version
- McpClientInfo serde roundtrip
- McpInitializeResponse::fcp_default(V2025_03) keeps V2025_03;
  fcp_default(V2024_11) keeps V2024_11 (both supported); response
  carries server_info=fcp-host
- McpResourceCapability: subscribe + list_changed → 'subscribe' +
  'listChanged' camelCase; both skip-when-None
- McpPromptCapability: list_changed → 'listChanged'
- McpResourceListRequest cursor skip-when-None ({} body when None)
- McpResourceEntry: mime_type → 'mimeType' camelCase; description +
  mime_type skip-when-None; full 4-field serde roundtrip
- McpResourceListResponse: next_cursor → 'nextCursor' camelCase;
  skip-when-None; full roundtrip with resources vec
- SessionStatus is_alive ⇔ {Active, Idle} (Idle is suspended NOT
  ended); is_ended ⇔ {Expired, Terminated}; XOR partition over all
  4 variants; Display snake_case for each

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
